title: Conditional Formatting to identify doubloon (or more)
excerpt:
Hi! 
What about a conditional formatting allowing to highlight doubloon in a given column? 
In the proposed rules, nothing seems exist to perform this task. 
Happy to ear what do you think :slight_smile:
